source.title: PDD Holdings Q4 2025 and FY2025 Unaudited Financial Results

extractions.claim: PDD FY2025 revenue reached RMB 431.8B (+10% YoY), with OMS and TS near parity for the first time
extractions.evidence: FY2025: Online marketing services RMB 217,783.0M (+10% YoY from RMB 197,934.2M). Transaction services RMB 214,062.7M (+9% YoY from RMB 195,901.9M). Total revenue RMB 431,845.7M (+10% YoY from RMB 393,836.1M). Revenue mix: OMS 50.4%, TS 49.6%.

verification.verifier_notes: Direct from official press release dated March 25, 2026

extractions.claim: Q4 2025 showed divergent growth: OMS decelerated to +5% while TS accelerated to +19%, signaling Temu-driven transaction growth
extractions.evidence: Q4 2025: OMS RMB 60,010.1M (+5% YoY from RMB 57,011.1M). TS RMB 63,902.1M (+19% YoY from RMB 53,599.0M). Total Q4 revenue RMB 123,912.2M (+12% YoY).

verification.verifier_notes: Direct from official Q4 2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: Quarterly OMS growth trajectory shows deceleration through 2025: Q1 +15%, Q2 +13%, Q3 +8%, Q4 +5%
extractions.evidence: Q1 2025 OMS growth +15%. Q2 2025 OMS growth +13%. Q3 2025 OMS RMB 53,300M (+8% YoY). Q4 2025 OMS RMB 60,010.1M (+5% YoY). This sequential deceleration suggests domestic ad monetization is approaching maturity.

verification.verifier_notes: Each quarter's growth rate sourced from respective quarterly earnings releases

extractions.claim: Revenue mix shifted from OMS-dominant to near-parity in 2 years, reflecting Temu's structural impact
extractions.evidence: FY2023: OMS was ~66% of revenue, TS ~34%. FY2024: OMS 50.3%, TS 49.7%. FY2025: OMS 50.4%, TS 49.6%. The shift from 2:1 OMS:TS ratio to 1:1 reflects Temu's transaction-based model contributing growing share.

verification.verifier_notes: Calculated from FY2023-2025 annual revenue figures in earnings releases
